bank.retain_mission: Extract Unreal world-building, multiplayer-architecture, technical-art, and systems-engineering decisions.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about Unreal version, networking model (replicated graph etc.), Niagara/Nanite usage, and systems-engineering patterns. Ignore transient blueprint experiments.
